name.ja: <ruby>風<rt>ふう</rt></ruby><ruby>霊<rt>れい</rt></ruby><ruby>術<rt>じゅつ</rt></ruby><ruby>師<rt>し</rt></ruby>ウィン

requirement.en: During your Main Phase that you Normal or Special Summoned this card, send 1 monster from your hand or field to the Graveyard.

effect.en: Place 1 face-up Effect Monster on your opponent's field on the bottom of the owner's Deck, except a Maximum Monster. This turn, you cannot activate the effect of "Wynn the Wind Spiritualist".
